game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Forge your own path in Hollow Knight! An epic action adventure through a vast ruined kingdom of insects and heroes. Explore twisting caverns, battle tainted creatures and befriend bizarre bugs, all in a classic, hand-drawn 2D style.

Hollow Knight Expands with Free Content



Godmaster - Take your place amongst the Gods. New Characters and Quest. New Boss Fights. Available Now!


Lifeblood - A Kingdom Upgraded! New Boss. Upgraded Bosses. Tweaks and Refinements across the whole game.


The Grimm Troupe - Light the Nightmare Lantern. Summon the Troupe. New Major Quest. New Boss Fights. New Charms. New Enemies. New Friends.


Hidden Dreams - Mighty new foes emerge! New Boss fights. New Upgrades. New Music.

Brave the Depths of a Forgotten Kingdom

Beneath the fading town of Dirtmouth sleeps an ancient, ruined kingdom. Many are drawn below the surface, searching for riches, or glory, or answers to old secrets.


Hollow Knight is a classically styled 2D action adventure across a vast interconnected world. Explore twisting caverns, ancient cities and deadly wastes; battle tainted creatures and befriend bizarre bugs; and solve ancient mysteries at the kingdom's heart.

Game Features

  • Classic side-scrolling action, with all the modern trimmings.
  • Tightly tuned 2D controls. Dodge, dash and slash your way through even the most deadly adversaries.
  • Explore a vast interconnected world of forgotten highways, overgrown wilds and ruined cities.
  • Forge your own path! The world of Hallownest is expansive and open. Choose which paths you take, which enemies you face and find your own way forward.
  • Evolve with powerful new skills and abilities! Gain spells, strength and speed. Leap to new heights on ethereal wings. Dash forward in a blazing flash. Blast foes with fiery Soul!
  • Equip Charms! Ancient relics that offer bizarre new powers and abilities. Choose your favourites and make your journey unique!
  • An enormous cast of cute and creepy characters all brought to life with traditional 2D frame-by-frame animation.
  • Over 130 enemies! 30 epic bosses! Face ferocious beasts and vanquish ancient knights on your quest through the kingdom. Track down every last twisted foe and add them to your Hunter's Journal!
  • Leap into minds with the Dream Nail. Uncover a whole other side to the characters you meet and the enemies you face.
  • Beautiful painted landscapes, with extravagant parallax, give a unique sense of depth to a side-on world.
  • Chart your journey with extensive mapping tools. Buy compasses, quills, maps and pins to enhance your understanding of Hollow Knight’s many twisting landscapes.
  • A haunting, intimate score accompanies the player on their journey, composed by Christopher Larkin. The score echoes the majesty and sadness of a civilisation brought to ruin.
  • Complete Hollow Knight to unlock Steel Soul Mode, the ultimate challenge!



An Evocative Hand-Crafted World

The world of Hollow Knight is brought to life in vivid, moody detail, its caverns alive with bizarre and terrifying creatures, each animated by hand in a traditional 2D style.


Every new area you’ll discover is beautifully unique and strange, teeming with new creatures and characters. Take in the sights and uncover new wonders hidden off of the beaten path.

If you like classic gameplay, cute but creepy characters, epic adventure and beautiful, gothic worlds, then Hollow Knight awaits!
game_info.description: Descend into the depths of a forgotten kingdom as a tiny knight exploring vast interconnected caverns. Battle through waves of infected creatures, collect soul energy to unlock powerful abilities, and face off against corrupted bosses. Navigate treacherous platforms, discover hidden paths, and grow stronger as you delve deeper into the mysterious underground realm. Can you reach the heart of the kingdom and survive the darkness below?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, look up/down (for vertical passages)
Space: Attack with nail (sword)
Shift: Dash (unlocked after collecting dash ability)
Z: Cast spell using collected soul (unlocked after first boss)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic movement and combat mechanics. Validate that the player can move, jump, attack enemies, and collect soul without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through the starting area, attack nearby enemies to collect soul, test jumping and basic platforming. Avoid taking unnecessary damage while exploring accessible areas.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, attacks enemies, collects soul energy, and navigates platforms. No game crashes or stuck states. Player maintains positive health throughout basic exploration.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves, attacks enemies, collects soul energy, and navigates platforms. No game crashes or stuck states. Player maintains positive health throughout basic exploration.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the complete win condition by reaching and defeating the final boss. This validates the entire game progression system including ability unlocks and boss battles.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate efficiently through caverns, defeat the first boss to unlock spell ability, collect the dash ability, then proceed to the deepest chamber to face the final corrupted boss. Use optimal attack patterns and dodging.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player successfully defeats both bosses, unlocks all abilities, reaches the heart of the kingdom, and triggers GAME_OVER_WIN state. Complete game progression validated from start to finish.
TEST_2.description: Test the complete win condition by reaching and defeating the final boss. This validates the entire game progression system including ability unlocks and boss battles.

TEST_3.test_description: Test fail conditions and health system. Validate that taking damage reduces health correctly and reaching zero health triggers game over.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally take damage from enemies and environmental hazards. Monitor health depletion and verify game over triggers when health reaches zero.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Health decreases correctly when damaged. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when health reaches zero. Game state properly tracks damage and health values.
TEST_3.description: Test fail conditions and health system. Validate that taking damage reduces health correctly and reaching zero health triggers game over.
TEST_3.strategy: Intentionally take damage from enemies and environmental hazards. Monitor health depletion and verify game over triggers when health reaches zero.

TEST_4.test_description: Test ability unlock progression system. Verify that abilities are properly gated and unlock at appropriate milestones.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Progress through the game collecting ability power-ups. Verify dash ability unlocks in designated area and spell ability unlocks after first boss defeat.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Abilities are properly locked at start. Dash and spell abilities unlock at correct checkpoints. Player can use abilities immediately after unlocking them.

TEST_5.test_description: Test platforming and collision detection. Validate that player interacts correctly with platforms, walls, and can navigate vertical passages.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Test jumping between platforms of various heights, interact with walls, test vertical passage transitions, and verify collision boundaries work correctly.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Player lands on platforms correctly, doesn't fall through floors, collides with walls appropriately, and can traverse vertical passages between cavern rooms.
